hero.title: Connected Communities. Sustained Lives.
hero.description: The trusted digital ecosystem connecting real volunteers with impactful opportunities to build a better future together.

footer.tagline: Building a better future through digital volunteerism.

dashboard.subtitle: Here's what's happening with your projects today.
dashboard.org_subtitle: Manage your projects and volunteers efficiently.

impact.title: Our Collective
impact.desc: Every connection creates measurable social impact.

featured.title: Make an Impact Today
featured.desc: Discover meaningful volunteer opportunities and start your journey to create lasting change.

categories.title: Explore by Category
categories.desc: Find volunteer opportunities that match your passion and skills.

how.title: Your Journey Starts Here
how.desc: Get started in minutes and begin making an impact today.
how.step1_desc: Create your free account as a volunteer or organization
how.step2_desc: Explore projects, events, and communities that match your interests
how.step3_desc: Apply to projects or recruit volunteers for your causes
how.step4_desc: Make a difference and earn certificates and achievements

testimonials.title: Stories from Our Community
testimonials.desc: Hear from volunteers and organizations who are making a difference.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.desc: Everything you need to know about JALA VIVE.

cta.title: Ready to Make an Impact?
cta.desc: Join thousands of volunteers and organizations creating positive change in communities across Indonesia.

about.hero_desc: JALA VIVE serves as a digital bridge that unites the spirit of volunteerism with social initiatives requiring tangible action.
about.vision_desc: "To become the most trusted digital volunteer ecosystem in Indonesia, ensuring equal access to self-development opportunities while nurturing a generation of active contributors who drive community progress through real and consistent engagement."
about.mission_desc: Our steps to manifest a trusted ecosystem.
about.m1_desc: Connecting individuals with volunteer opportunities across categories seamlessly without social network barriers.
about.m2_desc: A tracking system to document engagement as a valuable long-term capacity portfolio.
about.m3_desc: Facilitating organizers to find volunteers through matching mechanisms based on interest profiles and history.
about.m4_desc: Maintaining operations through a financially independent business model without sacrificing accessibility for the community.
about.values_desc: Four core values that serve as the foundation of every step of our movement.
about.v1_desc: The right to volunteer opportunities should not be determined by the breadth of one's network.
about.v2_desc: Authentic self-development is born from real experience and engagement.
about.v3_desc: An active ecosystem where every member strengthens each other through collaboration.
about.v4_desc: Every claim of social impact must be supported by verifiable evidence.
about.team_desc: The team of innovators building the future of volunteering.
about.cta_desc: Join thousands of volunteers and social organizations that have made a real impact on JALA VIVE.

explore.title: Explore Programs
explore.desc: Find and join volunteer opportunities that match your interests.
explore.no_programs: No programs found matching your search.
explore.already_applied: You have already applied for this program.
explore.cover_letter: Cover Letter / Why do you want to join?
explore.no_projects_desc: We couldn't find any projects matching your search. Try adjusting your filters.

communities.title: Verified
communities.desc: Discover and connect with trusted organizations making a real impact across Indonesia.
communities.search_placeholder: Search organizations by name or city...
communities.no_communities: No communities found matching your criteria.

events.title: Events
events.desc: Discover and participate in upcoming volunteer events.
events.search_placeholder: Search events by name or location...

partnership.hero_desc: Join forces with us to build a more sustainable and caring world. Whether you're a corporation, NGO, or university, we have the right tools to scale your initiatives.
partnership.tier_desc: Choose the tier that best fits your organization's goals.
partnership.cta_desc: Let's discuss how we can work together to maximize your social impact.
partnership.corporate_desc: Align your brand with impactful social and environmental projects. Engage your employees in corporate volunteering programs.
partnership.ngo_desc: Amplify your reach and connect with dedicated volunteers ready to support your noble causes.
partnership.com_desc: For local communities and universities looking to organize and manage their own impact initiatives.

vol_dash.no_active_projects_desc: You haven't applied to any projects yet. Start exploring to make an impact!

org_dash.no_projects: No projects found. Create one to get started!
org_dash.review_desc: Review volunteer details and application statement.

admin_dash.platform_desc: Monitor platform activity and manage system-wide settings.
admin_dash.broadcast_desc: Send a realtime notification to all currently connected users across the platform.
admin_dash.success_broadcast: Announcement broadcasted successfully to all online users!

wallet.wallet_desc: Manage your funds and view refund history from cancelled projects.
wallet.funds_available: Funds available for withdrawal to your bank account.
wallet.history_desc: History of your refunds and withdrawals.
wallet.org_wallet_desc: Manage your funds, view pending balances, and withdraw to your bank account.
wallet.pending_desc: Funds are held in escrow and will be available 24 hours after the volunteer program concludes.
wallet.platform_revenue_desc: Overview of platform fees collected, tips, and top ups.
wallet.global_tx_desc: Recent organization credits which generated platform fees.

projects.manage_desc: Create, edit, and track your volunteer projects.
projects.delete_warning: This will permanently delete the project and all of its associated data (applications, events, etc.). This action cannot be undone.
projects.no_projects: No projects found matching your search.
projects.submit_desc: Fill out the form below to publish a volunteer program.
projects.name: Program Name
projects.type_free_desc: Volunteers are not charged a registration fee.
projects.type_paid_desc: Volunteers are required to pay a registration fee (e.g., for donation, accommodation, etc.).
projects.tip_desc: Organizations can voluntarily give a tip as appreciation to the JALA VIVE platform.
projects.verification_notice: The JALA VIVE team will verify your program (1x24 business hours) after submission.
projects.err_fee: Please enter a registration fee and select at least one payment method.
projects.err_tip_method: Please select a payment method for the tip.
projects.err_login: You must be logged in to create a program.
projects.img_guidelines: PNG, JPG, WEBP up to 5MB. Recommended size 1200x600px.

applications.title: Applications
applications.desc: Review and manage volunteer applications for your projects.
applications.limit_volunteers: You have reached the maximum limit of 20 volunteers per project on the Free plan.
applications.limit_active: You have reached the maximum limit of 50 active applications on the Free plan.

projects.title: Manage Projects
projects.desc: Review new projects, manage events, and handle reported content.

community.title: Community
community.desc: Connect, share, and discuss with fellow volunteers.
community.no_discussions: No discussions yet. Be the first to start one!

settings.title: Settings
settings.desc: Manage your account settings and preferences.
settings.org_profile_desc: Update your public facing organization details.
settings.email_managed: Your email is managed by your authentication provider.
settings.security_desc: Update your password and secure your account.
settings.notif_desc: Choose what updates your organization receives.
settings.email_notifs_desc: Receive general platform updates and digests.
settings.new_apps_desc: Get notified when a volunteer applies to your projects.
settings.messages_notif_desc: Receive notifications for new direct messages.
settings.privacy_desc: Control how your organization appears to others.
settings.public_dir_desc: Allow volunteers to find your organization in the directory.
settings.show_volunteers_desc: Display the total number of volunteers you've worked with publicly.
settings.vol_desc: Manage your account preferences and security.
settings.notif_vol_desc: Choose what updates you want to receive.
settings.email_notifs_vol_desc: Receive emails about new projects and events.
settings.event_reminders_desc: Get notified 24 hours before your event starts.
settings.privacy_vol_desc: Control who can see your profile and activity.
settings.public_profile_vol_desc: Allow organizations to view your volunteer history.
settings.show_online_desc: Let others see when you are active on the platform.

analytics.title: Analytics & Reports
analytics.desc: Track your organization's impact and volunteer engagement.

charts.growth_desc: Number of active volunteers over time
charts.retention_desc: Percentage of volunteers who returned for a second project

volunteers.title: Volunteer Directory
volunteers.desc: Manage your community of approved volunteers and their records.
volunteers.no_volunteers_desc: You don't have any approved volunteers yet.

messages.title: Messages
messages.choose_contact: Choose a contact from the list to start messaging.

profile.title: Profile Setup
profile.desc: Complete your profile and upload your CV to start applying.
profile.reach_80: Reach 80% completion to apply for projects.
profile.bio_placeholder: Tell us a little about yourself...
profile.prof_exp_desc: Upload your CV to let organizations know your background.

subscription.title: Choose Your Scale of Goodness
subscription.desc: Increase your volunteer management capacity and maximize the social impact of every initiative your organization takes.
subscription.security_desc: Payments are processed securely. You can cancel your subscription at any time without additional charges.

starter.name: Starter Plan
starter.desc: Perfect for communities or small-scale social projects.
starter.feat1_desc: Limit to one project to keep focus.
starter.feat3_desc: Basic profile page to showcase vision.

pro.name: Pro Plan
pro.desc: Designed for event managers needing deeper data.
pro.feat1_desc: More flexible for campus orgs or foundations.

enterprise.name: Enterprise Plan
enterprise.desc: Complete solution for large orgs or CSR collabs.
